title: oxygraphis cymbalaria
intro: Oxygraphis cymbalaria, also known as Yunnan grass or Chinese knotweed, is a type of plant native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of the Himalayas and Yunnan province in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal properties. The health benefits of Oxygraphis cymbalaria include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and respiratory infections. Oxygraphis cymbalaria can be prepared as a tea or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make a medicinal wine and a topical paste for wound healing.
